Records.authors: Winterhalder, R., Magerya, V., Villa, E., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Butter, A., Heinrich, G., Plehn, T.
Records.description: One-loop massive pentagon integral occurring in $t\bar{t}V$ or $t\bar{t}H$ production. Five propagators: four massive (mass $m$, top quark) and one massless. Five external legs: $p_1, p_2$ massless; $p_3, p_4$ on-shell with mass $m$; $p_5$ off-shell with invariant mass $M$. Depends on four independent Mandelstam invariants plus $m^2$ and $M^2$. Has 4 independent Feynman parameters. Used as benchmark for neural network contour deformation optimization in pySecDec.

Records.authors: Winterhalder, R., Magerya, V., Villa, E., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Butter, A., Heinrich, G., Plehn, T.
Records.description: One-loop massive pentagon integral occurring in ttV or ttH production. Five propagators: four massive (mass m, top quark) and one massless. Five external legs: p1, p2 massless; p3, p4 on-shell with mass m; p5 off-shell with invariant mass M. Depends on four independent Mandelstam invariants plus m^2 and M^2. Has 4 independent Feynman parameters. Used as benchmark for neural network contour deformation optimization in pySecDec.
